schema_notes: Captures qualityStats, per-level cost/critChance/levelRequirement, and statSets with baseEffectiveness/constantStats/per-level damage arrays.

PoB's mod()/flag()/skill() inline helpers are stubbed to tagged dicts (see src/parsers/lua_skill_data.py). Other PoB globals are stubbed via a catch-all metatable; unknown identifiers resolve to placeholder dicts.
Lua 1-indexed arrays become Python 0-indexed lists in this JSON: levels[0] is game level 1, levels[19] is game level 20.
data_policy: Sourced from the community PathOfBuilding-PoE2 repo (Lua data files co-maintained by PoB devs from publicly known game numbers). Not from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install — this dataset complements the .datc64-extracted base data.
